selections.name: Jedi's Way

selections.name: Post Facto

selections.name: Royal Salute

selections.name: Aguila Negra

selections.name: Magnificent Rags
selections.reason: Solid closer but may be compromised by the lack of pace; still talented enough to hit the board.

selections.name: Sweetcatherinerose

selections.name: Genieinabridle
